concerns.text: FR-013 contains corrupted URL text: '( nodename nor servname provided, or not known)'))])' instead of valid KnotInfo URL. This blocks Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) verification per Reference-Validator Agent requirements. Previous revision attempts failed to fix this.

FR-013's KnotInfo citation is malformed and cannot be verified by Reference-Validator Agent. The URL must be corrected to a valid KnotInfo reference URL (e.g., https://knotinfo.math.indiana.edu/) before the Verified Accuracy Gate can pass.

InvariantsDataset contract fields (dataset_id, data_source, created_at, crossing_number_range, validated_range, total_records, hyperbolic_records, null_percentage_*) do not match data-model.md fields (records, download_timestamp, source_version, validation_scope). Contract and data model must align for consistency.

RegressionModel contract requires model_id, target, fitted_timestamp, random_seed, census_data_flag, p_value_disclaimer which are not defined in data-model.md's RegressionModel entity. Contract schema extends data model without documentation of the extension.
